message:
🐛 fix unaddressed Copilot review findings from 50 merged PRs (#9554)

Audited 146 Copilot inline review comments across 50 PRs merged in the
last 48 hours. None had replies. After verifying each against current
main, 21 still-present issues are fixed here:

**Go backend — concurrency & security**
- benchmarks.go: protect keepalive writes with streamMu (data-race)
- benchmarks.go: separate inner/outer semaphores (deadlock)
- benchmarks.go: read totalSent under lock before logging (data-race)
- benchmarks.go: make throttle() context-aware (cancellation delay)
- benchmarks.go: remove unused runResult type (non-streaming path)
- scrub.go: escape data in WrapUntrustedData (prompt injection)
- scrub.go: fix base64 "/" exclusion to only skip URLs (secret leak)
- scrub.go: match dotted Secret keys like tls.crt (secret leak)
- server.go: print auto-generated token to stderr (credential leak)
- server_ai.go: Stop() timer before Reset() (timer race)
- server_ai.go: use write-lock in quota check (concurrent overshoot)
- rewards.go: cap GitHub API reads with io.LimitReader (OOM)

**Frontend — state & UX**
- MissionControlDialog: clamp upperBound to PHASE_STEPS bounds (crash)
- kubara.ts: promise-based config dedup with retry on failure (race)
- useMissionControl: move dismissMission outside setState updater
- usePersistence: add credentials:include to /api/persistence/sync
- useVersionCheck: wrap clearLastCheckResult in useCallback (stability)
- useVersionCheck: set channelChangedRef before async sync (timing)
- useACMMStats: convert detectedIds to Set for O(1) lookups
- navbar dropdowns: replace z-50 with semantic z-dropdown token

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
